parameter_origin: fixed descriptive grid after reviewing session0 OOF score scales and post-inference attribution

strategy_semantics.fast0: opening-window raw Stage 2 evidence may atomically commit from READY to WAIT_IDLE
strategy_semantics.fast1: opening window and immediately following window use an isolated two-window EWMA and raw-class agreement
strategy_semantics.slow_fallback: historical candidate-local Stage 2 EWMA excludes opening window and remains bit-exact when fast paths do not commit
strategy_semantics.priority: Stage 1 abort before Fast-1 before slow commit before timeout; Fast-0 requires the Stage 1 opening condition
strategy_semantics.cache_reset: all fast and slow caches reset at segment boundary and every candidate or command exit
strategy_semantics.decision_time: window stop at native 250 Hz with 500-sample windows and 125-sample steps
strategy_semantics.truth_usage: labels and event boundaries are used only after inference for metrics and timing attribution
